"C:\Program Files\JetBrains\CLion 2025.3.3\bin\cmake\win\x64\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\bds_eph_c06.dir/objects.a
D:\softwareaddress\CMAKE\x86_64-15.2.0-release-win32-seh-ucrt-rt_v13-rev1\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\bds_eph_c06.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\bds_eph_c06.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\softwareaddress\CMAKE\x86_64-15.2.0-release-win32-seh-ucrt-rt_v13-rev1\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\bds_eph_c06.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o bds_eph_c06.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libbds_eph_c06.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\bds_eph_c06.dir\linkLibs.rsp
